title: 桜花賞の後に・花開く予兆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says this, Kawakami Princess slowly slumps
down on the turf like an old balloon.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
This year's Oka Sho was astounding! Will any of
these runners go on to be the stars of the Tiara
tour?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is there anyone you have your eye on
already? I really like...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spectators seem more excited than ever. She
must have been acutely aware of all those eyes on
her—and in a once-in-a-lifetime event, no less.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: What did you think of my race today, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even then, she didn't lose herself in blind pursuit
of victory. She stayed focused on achieving her
own current goals.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. It's a relief to hear you say that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I know that she'll be just fine.
